rationale: The cited paper’s focus on assortment reduction, perceived variety, and search efficiency is conceptually related to the citing paper’s shelf-layout mechanisms (perceived variety and complexity) in a retail context, so it could be more than incidental background. However, the evidence here is only a DOI-level match with no in-text citation context, and the citing note names other work (especially Morales et al. 2005) as its primary extension target. Given this mixed but incomplete evidence, it is not safe to drop or clearly keep.
